title: Cintas (CTAS) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Cintas (CTAS) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.61 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.48 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.12 per share a year ago.

title: Cintas (CTAS) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Cintas (CTAS) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended November 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2024 Second Quarter Results
text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) today reported results for its fiscal 2024 second quarter ended November 30, 2023. Revenue for the second quarter of fiscal 2024 was $2.38 billion compared to $2.17 billion in last year's second quarter, an increase of 9.3%. The organic revenue growth rate for the second quarter of fiscal 2024, which adjusts for the impacts of acquisitions and foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations, was 9.0%. Gross margin for the second quarter.

title: Cintas Corporation Announces Webcast for Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Results
text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq:CTAS) today announced that it will release fiscal year 2024 second quarter results on Thursday, December 21, 2023. The Company will conduct a conference call to address the financial results. A live webcast of the call will be available to individual investors and the public beginning at 10:00 a.m., Eastern Time, on Thursday, December 21, 2023. The webcast will be available at www.Cintas.com. Click on the webcast icon and then follow instr.

title: Cintas Corporation Named One of Newsweek's 2024 America's Most Responsible Companies
text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cintas makes the list for the third year in a row in Newsweek's fifth-annual corporate social responsibility rankings.
